Malaysian Businesses

Sound familiar?

If this is you
  • Your site looks fine — but no one enquires.
  • You can't say what makes you different in one line.
  • Visitors leave before they ever reach your offer.
Here's the fix
  • A site built to turn visitors into enquiries.
  • A clear message that lands in seconds.
  • A page journey that leads straight to your offer.
Story

Your website should make the next step obvious.

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence builds clear websites for service businesses that need visitors to understand the offer, trust the business, and know how to enquire.

We shape the message, page journey, pricing path, proof, and contact flow before building, so the finished site feels useful rather than decorative.

Client words

What it's like to work with us.

Process

Simple from
the client side.

Share the need

Tell us what you want to improve, launch, or simplify. No brief required — a conversation is enough to get started.

01
Confirm the direction

We turn the request into a clear offer, page structure, and build scope. You approve the direction before a single pixel is drawn.

02
We execute

We design, build, test, and prepare the approved work for launch. You bring the need. We handle the rest.

03
How it works
01
Step 01

Share the need

Tell us what you want to improve, launch, or simplify.

02
Step 02

Confirm direction

We turn the request into a clear offer, page structure, and build scope.

03
Step 03

We execute

We design, build, test, and prepare the approved work for launch.

© 2025 LUMIO Coordia Intelligence Refund Policy

Refund Policy

How Payments Work

Every project uses a 50% deposit before work starts, and 50% final payment before launch. No final payment is requested until you've approved the finished work.

Deposit Refunds

The deposit is non-refundable once work has started. Exceptions: cancel within 48 hours of paying (before any work begins), or if we can't start within 30 days of the agreed date.

Milestone Refunds

Cancelled before kickoff100% refund
Cancelled after kickoff, before design50% refund
Cancelled during design25% refund
Cancelled during buildNo refund

Scope & Delays

You'll never be charged for scope changes without prior written agreement. If your project is paused 60+ days with no response, a re-activation fee of RM 450 may apply.

Raise a Dispute

WhatsApp +60 17-720 9159 or email lumiocoordia@gmail.com. We respond within 1 business day and resolve billing disputes within 5.
